subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue circular headlight pools with prominent lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom radiating outward; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared commercial strip
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it nears the speed-hump, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes, glare clearing amid the drizzle

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the commercial strip, lifting over a speed-hump, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A flat Latin American commercial strip on a drizzly overcast night, a two-lane road lined with shuttered shopfronts, hand-painted signs, and tangled overhead wires. Worn wet asphalt with faded markings holds a dull sheen under a few buzzing sodium and fluorescent shop lights; no central divider. A low overcast reflects the town's dim glow. The road runs level then lifts over a topes speed-hump ahead, a crest that briefly hides then reveals the oncoming lane. Beyond the sparse lights the strip fades into damp grey-black.

lighting.conditions: Drizzly overcast night with sparse sodium and fluorescent shop lights; worn wet roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare ahead and slightly left through the drizzle
lighting.shadows: Weak diffuse shadows from mixed shop lights, faint reflections on wet asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Dull wet sheen catching sodium and fluorescent color on worn asphalt; oncoming high beams produce overwhelming drizzle-scattered bloom, starburst flares, and washout

aesthetics.composition: Commercial strip to a speed-hump near mid-frame, oncoming glare blooming upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Damp grey overcast and worn asphalt with warm sodium and cool fluorescent shop color, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, worn, disorienting, momentarily blinding, cautious in the drizzle
aesthetics.patterns: Shuttered shopfronts and overhead wire silhouettes sliding past on wet asphalt

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking along the strip, faint drizzle speckle, subtle rise over the speed-hump, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and faded markings ahead, though glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a commercial strip

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the commercial strip at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint past a speed-hump
Vehicle lifts over the speed-hump; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, flooding the drizzly view with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, strip becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the commercial strip at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing past a speed-hump
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear amid dim shop lights
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Lifting over the speed-hump as oncoming high beams flare into severe drizzle-scattered glare
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and starburst artifacts wash across the wet frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, strip regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a Latin American commercial strip on a drizzly night, ego headlights over worn wet asphalt and dim shop lights while a faint glow appears past a speed-hump. By 0:01 the vehicle lifts over the hump and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by drizzle-scattered white-blue glare, lens-flare starbursts, and bloom. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the strip reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady low hum of the engine and wet tire noise on worn asphalt, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates over the hump. Light drizzle, a buzzing shop light, a faint whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing, distant dogs; no music or speech.
